summary: Evening cycle 2026-03-29. Merged 3 PRs: kernel-em report (#1389), marketing-em report (#1390), critical worktree bootstrap fix (#1391, closes #1376). Flagged PR #1377 (studio-em) as CONFLICTING — needs human rebase. #1347 confirmed closed (PR #1371 merged prior cycle). Governance now fully operational in worktrees via main-binary fallback. P1 blockers #1335/#1342 (studio circuit breakers + Copilot event pipeline) remain open, assigned to studio squad. Version drift persists: cloud 2.10.1, analytics 2.10.2 vs kernel 2.10.3. Build startup hook failed in worktree context (same root cause as #1376, fixed by #1391 for runtime governance). New feature issues filed: 6-tier evaluator (#1381), browser governance (#1384), irreversible action detection (#1385), behavioral pacing (#1386).

details.title: chore(studio-em): 2026-03-29 evening EM run — triage #233 #234, conference critical path
details.note: Merge conflict. Auto-generated EM cycle report. Needs rebase by agent or jpleva91.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Worktree CLI binary crashes with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND
dogfoodPatterns.description: In git worktrees, apps/cli/dist/bin.js may exist but crash at startup because node_modules don't exist in the worktree. Before fix: governance silently broken for all tool calls in worktree. Fixed in PR #1391: wrapper now probes binary, falls back to main worktree binary if probe fails.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Turbo build startup hook fails in worktree context
dogfoodPatterns.description: pnpm build run from a worktree context fails with 'Cannot find module @red-codes/*' because worktrees don't have their own node_modules. Turbo reports cache hits for individual packages (from other worktrees' paths) but the CLI app has a fresh cache miss and cannot resolve workspace modules. Build fails but runtime binary from prior build still exists. Same root cause as #1376. PR #1391 fixes the runtime wrapper; build hook failure remains informational (not actionable for worktrees).
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Startup hook should skip pnpm build in worktree context, or Turbo config should disable build for worktrees without node_modules.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: docker stop/rm blocked for named ephemeral test containers
dogfoodPatterns.description: Destructive command guard blocks docker stop/rm on named ephemeral test containers (bench-devs-test-db). No distinction between production and test containers.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Add policy allowlist for known test container name patterns or expose a test-scope context.

dogfoodPatterns.description: Multiple copilot-driver agents report version as unknown.
